title: polyscias macdowallii
intro: Polyscias macdowallii, also known as the MacDowall's mangrove or the Australian cheesewood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Polyscias macdowallii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Polyscias macdowallii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, or by drying the leaves to create a tea or tincture.
